title: Spear
description: A minecraft datapack that adds the 1.21.11 spear items already to the game, while being balanced for single-and multiplayer.
body:
# Spear

### Datapack is also a texture pack! Just put the datapack in your recource pack folder.

## Features:
- **6 variants** of the spear.
- Attack with more entity **reach**.
- Hold right click to **charge** (the faster you go, the more damage you do).
- Custom **holding animations** in all perspectives.

Note that this datapack is not exactly the same as the spear from 1.21.11, but it's made to be very similar to it and also balanced for PVP and PVE. The datapack will **not** be updated soon to become more accurate compared to the spear from 1.21.11!

Have fun stabbing!
